tasks.title: Create canonical Spinner component
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/components/shared/feedback/Spinner.tsx + Spinner.module.css. Pure CSS animated ring (no external dep). Props: size ('sm'|'md'|'lg'), label (forwarded to aria-label), role='status'. Named export, full TS types, JSDoc, RO-RO props interface. Tests: apps/web/src/components/shared/feedback/test/Spinner.test.tsx — renders with role status, applies aria-label from label prop, applies size class. AAA pattern.

subtasks.title: Spinner.tsx with size/label props + aria-label + role=status

tasks.title: Create SkeletonCard + SkeletonCardList components
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/components/shared/feedback/SkeletonCard.tsx + SkeletonCard.module.css (configurable shimmer block: width, height, borderRadius) and SkeletonCardList.tsx (renders N SkeletonCards for list patterns). For use inside React islands (separate from Astro skeletons). Named exports, JSDoc, typed props, aria-hidden on decorative shimmer. Tests: test/SkeletonCard.test.tsx — applies width/height/borderRadius, SkeletonCardList renders requested count.

tasks.title: Create LoadingButton (or extend GradientButtonReact) + record decision
tasks.description: Per locked design decision 3: implementer picks ONE approach — standalone LoadingButton OR extend GradientButtonReact with loading/loadingLabel props. Create apps/web/src/components/shared/feedback/LoadingButton.tsx + LoadingButton.module.css: <button> wrapper accepting loading:boolean, loadingLabel:string (resolved i18n), renders aria-busy={loading} + disabled={loading} + inline <Spinner size='sm'/> when loading. Composes T-001 Spinner. Document the chosen approach (mixing both is forbidden). Tests: test/LoadingButton.test.tsx — aria-busy + disabled when loading, shows loadingLabel + spinner, forwards onClick when idle.

subtasks.title: LoadingButton.tsx with loading/loadingLabel + aria-busy + disabled + inline Spinner

tasks.title: Write loading-states convention doc
tasks.description: Create apps/web/docs/loading-states.md. Contents: decision table (skeleton vs spinner vs disabled-label vs optimistic UI); required a11y attrs (aria-busy, aria-live='polite', role='status'); when to use html[data-filters-loading] CSS pattern vs island state; links to each reference implementation; forbidden patterns ('...' strings, ⏳ emoji, per-component inline spinner CSS); record the T-003 LoadingButton-vs-GradientButtonReact decision. No code tests; markdown lint clean.

subtasks.title: Forbidden patterns + reference impl links + recorded decision

tasks.title: Add CI grep guard for forbidden loading patterns
tasks.description: Optional-but-listed Phase 1 task: add a grep-based CI check (script under scripts/ wired into CI, or a Biome check) that fails when '...' as a loading label or ⏳ emoji appears in apps/web/src/components/**/*.{tsx,client.tsx}. Must allowlist legitimate ellipsis (e.g. truncation copy) to avoid false positives — scope to known loading idioms. Self-test the script against a fixture. Document usage in the convention doc.

subtasks.title: Grep guard script with allowlist for non-loading ellipsis

tasks.title: Final consistency sweep + grep audit
tasks.description: Audit all *.client.tsx / *.tsx in apps/web/src/ for any remaining '...' loading labels or ⏳ emoji not covered by prior tasks; migrate each to the canonical toolkit.
